note: Research aid, not legal advice. Novelty not judged here (Fable G-NOVEL gate). Personal-access read-only web sources only; no web-posting performed. All hits enter IDS_pool regardless of tier.

sources.title_original: HTS linked partial insulation for HTS field coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Discloses independently varying the thermal vs. electrical properties of a turn-to-turn partial-insulation layer and circumferentially varying effective inter-turn resistance, i.e. decoupled electrical/thermal interface control is already claimed, though not as a radial inner-vs-outer-turn map keyed to a cryocooler cooling-power budget.
sources.quote: By varying the size of these regions and the number of connections between them and the metal connection layer, the thermal properties of the partially insulating layer can be varied independently of the electrical properties.

sources.title_original: High temperature superconductor field coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Same assignee/technology family; teaches varying bridge density along the interface tape to HOLD turn-to-turn resistance constant (opposite design goal from CF-1's intentional Rc gradient), useful as a boundary-defining contrast reference.
sources.quote: metal bridges described above may be varied along the insulator tape to ensure that the turn-to-turn resistance provided by the insulator tape remains (at least approximately) constant for each turn.

sources.title_original: Partially-Insulated HTS Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Parent patent of the Tokamak Energy family; claims varying window spacing along the coil so total per-turn resistance is constant, and a vanadium-oxide metal-insulator-transition interface alternative -- closest granted US reference on engineered spatial variation of turn-to-turn interface resistance, but no cold-head/cryocooler thermal-budget claim.
sources.quote: distance between windows... may be varied along the partially insulating layer so that the total resistance of each turn of the coil is constant.

sources.title_original: No-insulation multi-width winding for high temperature superconducting magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Spatially varies conductor WIDTH by axial position across an NI double-pancake stack (widest at top/bottom, narrowest at midpoint); establishes that spatial-parameter-variation across an NI coil stack is already patented subject matter, though the varied parameter is tape width, not turn-to-turn interface Rc/thermal path.
sources.quote: DP coils with the widest widths at the top and bottom of the stack, and DP coils with the narrowest coils located substantially at a midpoint... said first pancake coil and said second pancake coil each omit a turn-to-turn insulation.

sources.title_original: 도전성 물질로 함침된 무절연 초전도 코일 및 그의 제조장치
sources.title_translation: No-insulation superconducting coil impregnated with conductive material, and manufacturing apparatus thereof
sources.relevance_sentence: Uniform (not spatially mapped) conductive-impregnation interface layer between NI coil turns for hot-spot current bypass; found only via the Korean-language query pack, confirming the multilingual pass is necessary; no radial or thermal-to-cold-head claim.
sources.quote_original: 보빈 상에 감겨진 초전도 선재의 복수의 인접한 권선 턴들 사이에 배치된 도전성 함침 층
sources.quote_translation: a conductive impregnation layer disposed between a plurality of adjacent winding turns of superconducting wire wound on a bobbin

sources.assignee: Bar-Ilan University; RICOR Cryogenic and Vacuum Systems
sources.title_original: Method for manufacturing superconducting coils
sources.relevance_sentence: States the CF-1 problem statement almost verbatim -- low thermal conductivity of the turn-to-turn interface worsens conduction-cooled coil stability -- but solves it with a UNIFORM high-thermal-conductivity ceramic-filled resin rather than a spatial Rc/thermal co-map; closest problem-framing reference found, weak as a blocking claim (abandoned) but must stay in IDS_pool.
sources.quote: Low thermal conductivity increases cooling time and decreases heat removal during operation thus worsening coil stability.

sources.title_original: HTS linked partial insulation for HTS field coils
sources.relevance_sentence: PCT-stage record of the T1-1 family; ceased as an independent PCT matter but live via EP4078630A1 (granted) and EP4233081A2 (pending) national/regional phase entries.

sources.title_original: Non-destructive measurement method and apparatus for the turn-to-turn resistivity distribution in non-insulation superconducting coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Diagnostic method to reconstruct the spatial (turn-by-turn) distribution of contact resistivity that ALREADY EXISTS in a manufactured NI coil due to winding-tension variability -- adjacent to but distinguishable from CF-1's claim of deliberately engineering the spatial map; full text not extracted this wave (scanned PDF), flagged for retry.
sources.gap: full text not OCR-extracted; assignee unconfirmed

sources.title_original: 高温超导体场线圈
sources.relevance_sentence: Title-level match surfaced by the Chinese-language query pack; full claims and assignee not reviewed this wave.
sources.gap: full claims/assignee not reviewed; retry with direct Google Patents CN page fetch

sources.authors: Wang, Hahn, et al. (author list unconfirmed, gap)
sources.title_original: Improved stability, magnetic field preservation and recovery speed in (RE)Ba2Cu3Ox-based no-insulation magnets via a graded-resistance approach
sources.relevance_sentence: MOST IMPORTANT NPL HIT THIS WAVE: proposes patterned resistive-conductive layers inserted between SELECTED (not all) turn-to-turn contacts -- a deliberately designed, spatially non-uniform Rc map -- to contain hot-spot heat propagation while preserving current-sharing, i.e. the same 'engineer the spatial map on purpose' mechanism as CF-1, but optimized for quench/field-preservation, not for a cryocooler cold-head cooling-power budget / charging-delay-vs-hotspot-vs-cooling-W Pareto front.
sources.quote: A novel graded-resistance method has been proposed to tackle problems in no-insulation magnets while maintaining thermal stability and self-protection capability. Patterned resistive-conductive layers are inserted between selected turn-to-turn contacts to contain hot-spot heat propagation while maintaining turn-wise current sharing required for self-protection, resulting in faster post-quench recovery and reduced magnetic field transient.
sources.gap: exact volume/issue/full author list unconfirmed -- retry via direct IEEE Xplore query before G-NOVEL relies on this

sources.title_original: Systematic Study of the Contact Resistance Between REBCO Tapes: Pressure Dependence in the Case of No-Insulation, Metal Co-Winding and Metal-Insulation
sources.relevance_sentence: Foundational Rc-vs-pressure data (10-200 MPa, 77 K) for NI / metal-co-wind / metal-insulation interfaces underpinning the copper-vs-stainless ~130x thermal-path swing cited as CF-1's seed insight; background/validation NPL, not a spatial-map claim.

sources.title_original: Study of contact resistivity of a no-insulation superconducting coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Confirms spatial non-uniformity of contact resistance is observed as a manufacturing artifact (winding-tension variation) affecting AC current distribution -- as-built variability framing, not deliberate co-design, but weakens a 'nobody considered spatial Rc' novelty argument.

sources.title_original: Hot-Spot Modeling of REBCO NI Pancake Coil: Analytical and Experimental Approaches
sources.relevance_sentence: Analytical hot-spot models for NI coils; background for CF-1's peak-hotspot-delta-T sim objective.

sources.title_original: Surface Contact Approximation for Magneto-Thermal Finite Element Analysis of No-Insulation HTS Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Recent (2026) coupled electro-thermal contact-layer FE modeling method for NI coils; re-check at next refresh for any designed spatial Rc/thermal-conductance mapping claim.
sources.gap: full text not fetched this wave

sources.title_original: Explicit Turn Resolution with Anisotropic Homogenisation for Efficient 3D Magneto-Thermal Finite-Element Simulation of Large-Scale No-Insulation HTS Magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Turn-by-turn resolved electro-thermal simulation method for large NI magnets; potential simulation-methodology reference for CF-1's W2 sim stage, and re-check for any spatial-mapping claim.
sources.gap: full text not fetched this wave

sources.title_original: Control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity in resistively insulated REBCO coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Closest-titled 2026 preprint to CF-1's core mechanism (controlling turn-to-turn Rc); HIGH PRIORITY full-text retrieval next wave -- if it proposes a designed radial/cold-head-budget spatial map, it becomes a Tier-1-equivalent blocking NPL reference.
sources.gap: full text not fetched this wave -- highest-priority retry item

sources.title_original: A novel winding method for a no-insulation layer-wound REBCO coil to provide a short magnetic field delay and self-protect characteristics
sources.relevance_sentence: Layer-wound (not pancake) NI variant trading charging delay vs. self-protection -- same trade-off axis as CF-1 but different winding topology and no cold-head thermal-budget claim.

sources.title_original: CRUISE-class conduction-cooled NI racetrack field coils (product/demonstrator, not a patent)
sources.relevance_sentence: Confirms the anchor exemplar (Hinetics CRUISE-class conduction-cooled NI field coils) is real and active; no Hinetics-assigned patent numbers surfaced this wave.
sources.gap: no patents found under Hinetics name; retry with inventor-name search next wave

sources.title_original: 高温超导线的制备方法
sources.title_translation: Method for preparing high-temperature superconducting wire
sources.relevance_sentence: Wire manufacturing method, not coil interface design -- low relevance.

sources.title_original: 高温超导导线和线圈
sources.relevance_sentence: General HTS wire/coil patent; not reviewed in full text this wave.

sources.title_original: 部分絶縁巻線を用いた超電導コイル及び超電導コイルの製造方法
sources.title_translation: Superconducting coil using partially-insulated winding, and manufacturing method thereof
sources.relevance_sentence: Appears to be the JP national-phase entry of the Tokamak Energy WO2019150123A1/US11101060B2 family (T1-3); listed to avoid double-counting until family membership confirmed.

sources.title_original: 高温超電導コイルおよびその製造方法
sources.title_translation: High-temperature superconducting coil and manufacturing method thereof
sources.relevance_sentence: Addresses substrate-peeling degradation, not turn-to-turn interface Rc/thermal co-design.

titles_translation: Wireless power transfer device using HTS coil
Hybrid cooling apparatus for superconducting power equipment
Coil cooling method, coil cooling system, and liquid cooling coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Surfaced by Korean query pack but off-target: general cooling hardware / wireless power transfer, not turn-to-turn interface co-design.

titles: Thermal conductance gasket for zero boiloff superconducting magnet
Resin-impregnated superconducting magnet coil comprising a cooling layer
Superconducting magnet having a shock-resistant support structure
Inner cold-warm support structure for superconducting magnets
Superconducting magnet with cold head thermal path cooled by heat exchanger
sources.relevance_sentence: Coil-to-cold-head thermal HARDWARE (gaskets, cooling layers, cold-warm mechanical supports) rather than the turn-to-turn INTERFACE doing double electrical+thermal duty; CPC-adjacent (H01F6/04) background, not on-point.
